Appearances:
Plaintiff Syts Investments, LLC is present. Represented by Siavash Tahbazof
Attorney Yosef Tahbazof appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Yolany Garcia is present.
Attorney Thomas Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of July-02 -2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
